task:
Build a color-graded Image source in OBS Studio with two stacked filters. The final collection must contain exactly one scene named 'Color Grade' (no default 'Scene' left over).

The 'Color Grade' scene must contain an Image source named exactly 'Footage' with file /home/user/Pictures/raw_footage.png.

Apply two filters to 'Footage' with these exact names, types, and settings:
- 'Grade' — Color Correction with Saturation = 0.4, Contrast = 0.15, Brightness = -0.05, Gamma = 0.1
- 'Warm LUT' — Apply LUT with LUT file /home/user/Pictures/warm_lut.png and Amount = 1.0

Persist the changes to the scene collection JSON.

verification.description: Source 'Footage' is in the 'Color Grade' scene
'Grade' filter is a color correction filter

verification.eval: abs(float(result.get('settings', {}).get('saturation', 0)) - 0.4) < 0.01 and abs(float(result.get('settings', {}).get('contrast', 0)) - 0.15) < 0.01 and abs(float(result.get('settings', {}).get('brightness', 0)) - (-0.05)) < 0.01 and abs(float(result.get('settings', {}).get('gamma', 0)) - 0.1) < 0.01

verification.description: 'Warm LUT' filter is an Apply LUT filter
